PHASE:        Phase 8 Batch 6 Sub-batch 6.2a SHIPPED — Per Area Report Page 1 (Event Breakdown + Patrol Summary) RSC + Client chart island + data loader + page.tsx dispatch wiring for the new "area" reportType. First Per Area Report sub-batch — establishes the apps/web/src/server/per-area-report/ + print-render/[tenantSlug]/area/[exportId]/ scaffold that 6.2b (Page 2 heatmap) and 6.2c (Page 3 fuel) extend. The full pipeline is OPERABLE for Page 1: any ReportExport row with reportType='area' + paramsJson={areaBoundaryId, startDate, endDate} renders an A4 landscape HTML doc → Puppeteer → PDF → MinIO → download via the existing Batch 5 Item 3 pipeline (no new pipeline plumbing needed — only the new render template + loader).

              NEW apps/web/src/server/per-area-report/get-per-area-report-data.ts (~315 LOC). PerAreaReportData contract: tenant, area (id+name+region+source), dateRange (start+end+label+isDefault), paperSize, generatedAt, lawEnforcementBreakdown[], monitoringBreakdown[], patrolSummary: { foot, seaborne } with count/totalDistanceKm/totalHours. parsePerAreaParams accepts { areaBoundaryId?, startDate?, endDate? } from ReportExport.paramsJson — drops invalid values defensively. resolveDefaultMonthRange returns tenant-local current calendar month when params do not pin a window (per spec L132 "Date range picker (default: current month)"). Area resolution: explicit areaBoundaryId → findUnique with tenant cross-check; fallback to first enabled boundary alphabetically when missing. Event grouping: case-insensitive substring on EventType.category against "law enforcement" / "monitoring" needles — DYNAMIC per spec L133-L134 ("new types added in EarthRanger appear automatically"). Tie-break: count DESC then display ASC. Null km/hours on individual patrols contribute 0 to PatrolType totals.

              NEW per-area-report.tsx (~125 LOC) — top-level RSC composer. Self-contained HTML document with @page paper size + header band (tenant name, area name, date range, default-range badge when fallback triggered, generated timestamp). Mounts Page1EventAndPatrolSummary.

              NEW page-1-event-and-patrol-summary.tsx (~245 LOC) — Page 1 RSC. Header (area + date range), two-column charts grid (law enforcement left, monitoring right), three patrol summary cards (foot / seaborne / total with count + km + hours). Mock-friendly EventBreakdownChart mount points.

              NEW components/event-breakdown-chart.tsx (~135 LOC) — Client island. Recharts horizontal BarChart with variant-driven palette (red-600 lawEnforcement / cyan-600 monitoring). Top-N filter default 10 with stable display-ASC tiebreak. Empty-state copy per variant. Same inline-style + ResponsiveContainer pattern as Page 3 AreaCoveredChart — avoids Tailwind layer resolution in standalone print HTML.

              MODIFIED page.tsx — add "area" reportType branch. Calls getPerAreaReportData → null → notFound() → <PerAreaReport data={data}>. URL slug = schema ReportType enum value `area` (NOT the PRODUCT.md route label "per-area"). VALID_REPORT_TYPES set updated. Decision locked to [[feedback-pdf-print-render-url-slug-equals-enum-value]] in lessons.md.

              Tests: 32 net new vitest cases. 23 in get-per-area-report-data.test.ts (parsePerAreaParams ×4, resolveDefaultMonthRange ×3, getPerAreaReportData ×16 covering null guards, tenant/area cross-tenant guard, fallback area path, default vs explicit date range, label formatting, event grouping with mixed categories + null eventType skip, tie-break ordering, empty buckets, patrol summary split with null totals, prisma query scoping, full shape population). 9 in page-1-event-and-patrol-summary.test.tsx via renderToStaticMarkup with EventBreakdownChart mocked (section frame, meta line, chart variant mounting + counts, empty breakdowns, patrol-card metric formatting, explicit-range label preservation, source-order checks for both grids).
